description: Example task queue. Copy to tasks.json and edit for your pipeline. Typical sources: conductor-core/phases/, a sprint plan, a migration runbook.

tasks.title: Preflight + scope map
tasks.description: Run preflight checks, inventory the design source of truth, build the codebase map, list deletion candidates. No application code changes. See conductor-core/phases/phase-0-preflight-and-scope-map.md.
acceptance_criteria: Deletion candidates written and surfaced to user

tasks.title: Parity / scaffold baseline
tasks.description: Bring the project to structural parity with the design source of truth. Every visible unit has a rendered counterpart in the live app. No business logic wiring. See conductor-core/phases/phase-1-parity-scaffold.md.
acceptance_criteria: Every design-inventory row has MATCH or SCAFFOLDED status
Every scaffolded unit has empty/loading/error/success states

tasks.title: Wire P0 write paths
tasks.description: Every P0 write action lands in canonical storage. Auth + validation + error handling on each. See conductor-core/phases/phase-2-write-paths.md.
acceptance_criteria: Every P0 write lands in canonical storage
Every write has auth + validation + error handling
Every write has at least 1 integration test
tasks.rollback_command: git revert <writes-commit> && apply rollback migration if DB-affecting

tasks.title: Replace mocks with real reads
tasks.description: Every mock read replaced with a real query with supporting index. See conductor-core/phases/phase-3-read-paths.md.
acceptance_criteria: Every mock read replaced with a real query
Every read has supporting indexes within latency budget

tasks.title: Realtime + triggers + audit
tasks.description: Wire realtime updates, triggers for write side effects, audit trail. See conductor-core/phases/phase-4-realtime-and-triggers.md.
acceptance_criteria: Every realtime surface converges within budget
Every trigger fires, retries correctly, DLQs on permanent failure
Audit trail records declared events with PII redacted

tasks.title: Polish -- a11y, performance, copy, edge cases
acceptance_criteria: a11y score above declared threshold on every shipped surface

tasks.title: Release gate
tasks.description: Walk every prior phase's exit criteria, run every declared gate, verify rollback plan, issue verdict. See conductor-core/phases/phase-6-release-gate.md.
